Work History

Experience

Data Engineer / BI Analyst
Vizient – Irving, TX
Aug 2024 – Present
  • Built Power BI dashboards tracking 15+ KPIs across pharmaceutical supply chains — inventory, contract compliance, shortage alerts.
  • Wrote and optimized SQL queries against Snowflake to automate weekly reports covering 50K+ SKUs, cutting manual reporting time by 30%.
  • Set up consistent data validation steps across pipelines, stopping errors that erode leadership trust.
  • Worked with business teams to build not just what they asked for, but what turned out to be useful.
Data Analyst
United Airlines – Chicago, IL
Feb 2024 – Aug 2024
  • Ran daily flight delay reports for 50+ routes in Power BI and Excel with 99% accuracy.
  • Analyzed 500+ customer feedback tickets weekly; identified baggage and refund patterns for ops leadership.
  • Trained 15 team members on dashboards — manual report requests dropped 30% within two months.
Data Analyst
Senor Enterprises – Houston, TX
Jan 2022 – Jan 2024
  • Built a fraud detection model in Excel using linear regression against 15K+ monthly transactions — fraud losses dropped 32% in six months.
  • Turned model output into a risk-scoring dashboard; investigation time dropped from 4 hours to 15 minutes per case.
  • Presented monthly fraud trend updates to senior management — clear, focused, no jargon.
Data Scientist – Fleet Compliance & Control
Cheetay Logistics – Karachi, Pakistan
Dec 2016 – Jun 2020
  • Diagnosed why 12% of riders were pausing — 68% were app crashes. Fixed it; pause rate dropped from 12% to 3%.
  • Cut average delivery time from 40 to 36 minutes by analyzing route patterns.
  • Built main operations dashboard tracking 200+ KPIs, replacing 20+ weekly manual reports.

About Me

Who I Am

I am a Data Engineer and BI Developer with 5+ years of experience across logistics, finance, aviation, and healthcare. I hold a Master's in Data Analytics from North American University (GPA 3.72) and a B.E. in Electrical Engineering.

I spend most of my time in SQL, Power BI, and Excel — building dashboards people actually use, cleaning up messy data pipelines, and helping non-technical teams make sense of numbers.

I've built fraud models that saved real money, trained teams on tools they didn't know they needed, and presented findings to executives without losing them in the weeds. Based in Beaverton, OR.

🎓 Education
M.S. Data Analytics — North American University (GPA 3.72)
B.E. Electrical Engineering — Sir Syed University
🏢 Industries
Healthcare · Aviation · Finance · Logistics
🏆 Key Achievements
32% fraud reduction · 30% reporting time saved · 200+ KPI dashboard built
📍 Location
Beaverton, OR — Open to remote & hybrid roles
